Careers

Build your career at Velar Info with meaningful AI work, flexible growth, and strong team support.

Why join us

Benefits designed for high-growth AI talent.

Flexible work hours

Remote and hybrid-friendly

Learning stipend and certifications

Fast growth career ladder

Health coverage and wellness support

Meaningful AI projects with real clients

Open roles

Join the team that is transforming businesses with AI.

Senior AI/ML Engineer

Remote — India · Full-Time

Apply

Build and fine-tune LLMs, NLP pipelines, and conversational AI models. 3+ years in ML, strong Python & Hugging Face experience required.

Full Stack Developer (Next.js + Node.js)

Remote — India · Full-Time

Apply

Develop scalable web apps and AI dashboards. Proficient in Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and REST APIs. 2+ years experience required.

AI Sales Executive

Bangalore / Mumbai · Full-Time

Apply

Drive B2B sales of our AI products to enterprises and government clients. 2+ years in SaaS or enterprise sales.

Conversational AI Designer

Remote — India · Full-Time

Apply

Design chatbot conversation flows, voice UX scripts, and AI interaction patterns. Experience with Botpress or Dialogflow preferred.

DevOps / Cloud Engineer

Remote — India · Full-Time

Apply

Manage AWS/GCP infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and AI model deployment. Experience with Docker, Kubernetes required.

AI Research Intern

Remote — India · Internship

Apply

Assist in training and evaluating NLP/LLM models. Final year CS/AI students or recent graduates. 3-6 month internship.

Hiring flow

A fast, clear process built for working professionals.

Discover

Browse open roles, explore our company culture, and find the position that matches your strengths.

Connect

Submit your application, and our talent team will schedule a conversation to learn more about your goals.

Solve

Complete a practical exercise or case discussion that reflects the kind of work we do daily.

Join

Receive an offer, get onboarded quickly, and start building AI products for clients and internal innovation.
